# Fix authentication timeout bug

This PR addresses the session timeout issue reported in #142.

## Changes

- Increased default session timeout from 30 minutes to 60 minutes
- Added exponential back-off for retry logic in `auth_client.py`
- Updated unit tests to cover the new timeout paths
- Bumped `requests` dependency to 2.31.0 to pick up upstream security fix

## How to test

1. Check out this branch and run `pytest tests/auth/`
2. Verify no regressions in `tests/integration/test_login.py`
3. Manually test the login flow in the staging environment

---

START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS

- Consider adding a configuration option to allow users to set the timeout
  value at runtime via an environment variable.
- The exponential back-off implementation could be extracted into a shared
  utility module so that other clients can reuse it.
- Make sure to update the CHANGELOG.md file to document this behaviour change.
- You might also want to add a metric / counter to track how often the
  back-off is triggered in production.

END COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS

---

## Additional context

The root cause was traced back to the upstream identity provider reducing
their default token TTL. This fix aligns our client expectations with the
new provider defaults.
